{{Quote|Come between me and my mark and you will share their fate!|Rhalia Jinsari|<ref name="SWG" />}}
'''Rhalia Jinsari''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. During [[1 ABY/Legends|1.5 ABY]], she was sent by the [[Dim-U/Legends|Dim-U]] monks to kill [[Vardias Tyne]], after he ended up killing a [[Bantha/Legends|bantha]] that was destroying his [[Moisture vaporator/Legends|vaporators]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|The bounty hunter's name is Rhalia Jinsari. Stop her from bringing me in to those insane zealots, and I'll gladly reward you.|[[Vardias Tyne]]|<ref name="SWG" />}}
During [[1 ABY/Legends|1.5 ABY]], [[Vardias Tyne]], a resident of [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], killed a [[Bantha/Legends|bantha]] that was destroying his [[Moisture vaporator/Legends|vaporators]]. Unfortunately for Vardias, Brother [[Chonar]] of the bantha-worshiping [[Dim-U/Legends|Dim-U]] monks learned of this, and hired Rhalia Jinsari, a [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], to kill Vardias Tyne.<ref name="SWG" />

{{Gamemechanics}}
However, before Rhalia could reach [[City/Legends|town]], she was killed by a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] who agreed to help Vardias.<ref name="SWG" />
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
Rhalia Jinsari was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|Non-Player Character]] (NPC) in the [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''. Players who performed a series of [[:w:c:swg:Quest|quests]] for [[Vardias Tyne]] in [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]] had to hunt down and kill Rhalia Jinsari outside the [[City/Legends|town]]. Although Rhalia's physical characteristics were obscured by her [[Armor/Legends|armor]], examining her revealed that she was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]]. Although the player could choose not to do Vardias Tyne's quest to kill Rhalia, this article assumes 100% game completion.<ref name="SWG" />

==Appearances==
